best_for: Overall safety, comfort, and ease of use with lie-flat and SlideTech features.
title: Maxi-Cosi Pebble 360 Pro2
description: A premium i-Size infant car seat offering a full lie-flat position for maximum sleep comfort, 360-degree rotation, and SlideTech for easy access. Suitable from birth to approximately 15 months.
why_pip_picked_this: This seat excels in safety (Good ADAC rating), comfort (lie-flat), and user-friendliness (SlideTech, 360 rotation), directly addressing the need for safe and prepared early outings.
founder_lens: The ISOFIX base is sold separately, which can significantly increase the overall cost. Ensure this is highlighted to avoid unexpected expenses for parents.
safety_notes: ISOFIX base sold separately; Always check car seat compatibility with your vehicle before purchase.

product_name: Cloud T i-Size Rotating Baby Car Seat
best_for: Ergonomic lie-flat position and superior side-impact protection.
title: Cybex Cloud T i-Size
description: An i-Size infant car seat with an innovative lie-flat recline for use in and out of the car, 180-degree rotation (with Base T), and enhanced side-impact protection. Suitable from birth to approximately 24 months.
why_pip_picked_this: Its lie-flat technology and ADAC Test Winner status provide excellent comfort and safety for newborns, making early journeys more comfortable and secure.
founder_lens: The ISOFIX Base T is sold separately. Clarify that the lie-flat feature in the car requires the Base T.
safety_notes: ISOFIX Base T sold separately; Always check car seat compatibility with your vehicle before purchase.

product_name: PIPA URBN R129 Baby Car Seat
best_for: Ultra-lightweight and baseless ISOFIX installation for easy transfers.
title: Nuna Pipa Urbn
description: An ultra-lightweight infant car seat (3.3kg) with integrated baseless ISOFIX installation, allowing for quick and secure fitting without a separate base. Ideal for urban parents and frequent car changes.
why_pip_picked_this: Its unique baseless ISOFIX and ultra-lightweight design make it exceptionally convenient for parents needing to frequently move the car seat between vehicles or use ride-shares, simplifying early outings.
founder_lens: While highly convenient, the baseless ISOFIX might not be compatible with all vehicles. Emphasize checking the vehicle fitting list.
safety_notes: Always check car seat compatibility with your vehicle before purchase.

best_for: Extreme lightness, ergonomic design, and suitability for premature babies.
title: Avionaut Pixel Pro 2.0 C
description: The lightest i-Size infant car seat on the market (2.5kg) featuring a modular insert with Cloud Care System for ergonomic positioning and superior safety, even for premature babies.
why_pip_picked_this: Its ultra-lightweight design and ergonomic insert specifically cater to the delicate needs of newborns and premature babies, ensuring optimal comfort and safety during early travels.
founder_lens: While highly praised for lightness and ergonomics, direct retail ratings/review counts were not readily available on the primary retailer site. Rely on expert reviews for quality proof.
safety_notes: ISOFIX base sold separately; Always check car seat compatibility with your vehicle before purchase.

product_name: Turn2Me DLX i-Size R129 360° Rotating Car Seat
title: Graco Turn2Me DLX i-Size
description: An affordable i-Size car seat offering 360-degree rotation and extended rear-facing capability from birth up to approximately 4 years. Features easy installation and multiple recline positions.
why_pip_picked_this: Provides excellent value as a budget-friendly option that doesn't compromise on key features like 360-degree rotation and extended rear-facing, making it accessible for more families.
founder_lens: The side-impact protection pod needs to be fitted separately each time, which could be a minor inconvenience for parents.
safety_notes: Side-impact protection pod needs to be fitted separately each time; Always check car seat compatibility with your vehicle before purchase.
